records.ety: [OE. dytane, detane, dytan, OF. ditain, F. dictame, L. dictamnum, fr. Gr. di`ktamnon , di`ktamnos, a plant growing in abundance on Mount Dicte in Crete. Cf. Dittander.]

defs: A plant of the Mint family (Origanum Dictamnus), a native of Crete.
In America, the Cunila Mariana, a fragrant herb of the Mint family.
